name: Olive-Tahini Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Liquid from canned black olives
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the flour in enough water to make a smooth, flowing paste. Set aside.
2. Heat the water and olive liquid from canned black olives until just under boiling point.
3. Whisk in the tahini gradually, then add the flour paste.
4. Simmer over low heat until the sauce is thick.
5. Stir in the remaining ingredients (remaining chopped black olives, lemon juice, thyme, and black pepper).
6. Serve immediately.
